Package com.rays.common

Class BaseDAOImpl<T extends BaseDTO>

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.rays.common.BaseDAOImpl<T>
  • Type Parameters:
    T - the DTO type extending BaseDTO that this DAO manages
    All Implemented Interfaces:
    BaseDAOInt<T>
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    AttachmentDAOImpl, CollegeDAOImpl, CourseDAOImpl, FacultyDAOImpl, MarksheetDAOImpl, RoleDAOImpl, StudentDAOImpl, SubjectDAOImpl, TimeTableDAOImpl, UserDAOImpl
    public abstract class BaseDAOImpl<T extends BaseDTO>
extends java.lang.Object
implements BaseDAOInt<T>
    Abstract base implementation of BaseDAOInt providing common JPA-based data access operations for all DAO classes in the application.

    Concrete DAO implementations must extend this class and provide the specific DTO class type and the WHERE clause predicates for custom search queries.

    Author:
    Ajay Pratap Kerketta

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      protected javax.persistence.EntityManager entityManager
      The JPA EntityManager used for all database interactions.

    • Field Detail

      • entityManager

        protected javax.persistence.EntityManager entityManager
        The JPA EntityManager used for all database interactions. Injected by the persistence context.

    • Constructor Detail

      • BaseDAOImpl

        public BaseDAOImpl()

    • Method Detail

      • getDTOClass

        public abstract java.lang.Class<T> getDTOClass()
        Returns the Class object of the DTO type managed by this DAO.

        Must be implemented by each concrete subclass to enable generic JPA queries.

        Returns:
        the Class of the DTO type T

      • getWhereClause

        protected abstract java.util.List<javax.persistence.criteria.Predicate> getWhereClause​(T dto,
                                                                                       javax.persistence.criteria.CriteriaBuilder builder,
                                                                                       javax.persistence.criteria.Root<T> qRoot)
        Builds the list of JPA Predicate objects representing the WHERE clause for search queries specific to the concrete DTO type.
        Parameters:
        dto - the DTO instance containing filter criteria values
        builder - the CriteriaBuilder used to construct predicates
        qRoot - the Root of the criteria query representing the entity
        Returns:
        a List of Predicate objects to be applied as the WHERE clause

      • populate

        protected void populate​(T dto,
                        UserContext userContext)
        Hook method to populate additional fields on the DTO before persisting or merging.

        Default implementation is empty. Subclasses may override this to set entity-specific derived or computed fields.

        Parameters:
        dto - the DTO to be populated
        userContext - the current user's context

      • add

        public long add​(T dto,
                UserContext userContext)
        Persists a new DTO entity to the database.

        Sets the createdBy, createdDatetime, modifiedBy, and modifiedDatetime audit fields before persisting. Also calls populate(T, com.rays.common.UserContext) for any subclass-specific field population.

        Specified by:
        add in interface BaseDAOInt<T extends BaseDTO>
        Parameters:
        dto - the DTO entity to be added; must not already exist in the database
        userContext - the current user's context used to set audit fields
        Returns:
        the generated primary key (id) of the newly persisted entity

      • update

        public void update​(T dto,
                   UserContext userContext)
        Merges (updates) an existing DTO entity in the database.

        Updates the modifiedBy and modifiedDatetime audit fields before merging. Also calls populate(T, com.rays.common.UserContext) for subclass-specific field population.

        Specified by:
        update in interface BaseDAOInt<T extends BaseDTO>
        Parameters:
        dto - the DTO entity containing updated values; must have a valid ID
        userContext - the current user's context used to set audit fields

      • delete

        public void delete​(T dto,
                   UserContext userContext)
        Removes a DTO entity from the database.
        Specified by:
        delete in interface BaseDAOInt<T extends BaseDTO>
        Parameters:
        dto - the managed DTO entity to be deleted
        userContext - the current user's context (not directly used in deletion but passed for consistency)

      • findByPk

        public T findByPk​(long id,
                  UserContext userContext)
        Finds and returns a single entity by its primary key.
        Specified by:
        findByPk in interface BaseDAOInt<T extends BaseDTO>
        Parameters:
        id - the primary key of the entity to look up
        userContext - the current user's context
        Returns:
        the DTO entity matching the given primary key, or null if not found

      • findByUniqueKey

        public T findByUniqueKey​(java.lang.String attribute,
                         java.lang.Object value,
                         UserContext userContext)
        Finds and returns a single entity matching a specific attribute-value pair (unique key lookup).

        Uses JPA Criteria API to construct a query with an equality condition on the given attribute. Returns the first result if multiple matches exist.

        Specified by:
        findByUniqueKey in interface BaseDAOInt<T extends BaseDTO>
        Parameters:
        attribute - the entity field name to match against (e.g., "email")
        value - the value the attribute must equal
        userContext - the current user's context
        Returns:
        the first matching DTO entity, or null if no match is found

      • createCriteria

        protected javax.persistence.TypedQuery<T> createCriteria​(T dto,
                                                         UserContext userContext)
        Builds and returns a TypedQuery using the criteria defined in getWhereClause(BaseDTO, CriteriaBuilder, Root).

        This is a shared utility used by both paginated and non-paginated search methods.

        Parameters:
        dto - the DTO containing search filter values
        userContext - the current user's context
        Returns:
        a TypedQuery constructed from the entity's WHERE clause predicates

      • search

        public java.util.List search​(T dto,
                             int pageNo,
                             int pageSize,
                             UserContext userContext)
        Searches for entities matching the filter criteria in the given DTO, with pagination.

        If pageSize is 0 or less, all matching records are returned without pagination. Otherwise, the result is limited to pageSize records starting from pageNo * pageSize.

        Specified by:
        search in interface BaseDAOInt<T extends BaseDTO>
        Parameters:
        dto - the DTO containing search filter criteria
        pageNo - the zero-based page index
        pageSize - the maximum number of records to return; if ≤ 0, returns all records
        userContext - the current user's context
        Returns:
        a List of matching DTO entities for the specified page

      • search

        public java.util.List search​(T dto,
                             UserContext userContext)
        Searches for all entities matching the filter criteria in the given DTO, without pagination.

        Delegates to search(BaseDTO, int, int, UserContext) with pageNo=0 and pageSize=0 to retrieve all matching records.

        Specified by:
        search in interface BaseDAOInt<T extends BaseDTO>
        Parameters:
        dto - the DTO containing search filter criteria
        userContext - the current user's context
        Returns:
        a List of all matching DTO entities

      • marksheetMeritList

        public java.util.List marksheetMeritList​(java.lang.String hql,
                                         UserContext userContext)
        Executes a raw HQL query and returns the top 10 results.

        Intended for specialized use cases such as merit list generation. The result is always limited to the first 10 records.

        Parameters:
        hql - the HQL query string to execute
        userContext - the current user's context
        Returns:
        a List of up to 10 query result objects

      • isEmptyString

        protected boolean isEmptyString​(java.lang.String val)
        Checks whether a String value is null or blank.
        Parameters:
        val - the string value to check
        Returns:
        true if the value is null or contains only whitespace; false otherwise

      • isZeroNumber

        protected boolean isZeroNumber​(java.lang.Double val)
        Checks whether a Double value is null or zero.
        Parameters:
        val - the Double value to check
        Returns:
        true if the value is null or equals 0; false otherwise

      • isZeroNumber

        protected boolean isZeroNumber​(java.lang.Long val)
        Checks whether a Long value is null or zero.
        Parameters:
        val - the Long value to check
        Returns:
        true if the value is null or equals 0; false otherwise

      • isZeroNumber

        protected boolean isZeroNumber​(java.lang.Integer val)
        Checks whether an Integer value is null or zero.
        Parameters:
        val - the Integer value to check
        Returns:
        true if the value is null or equals 0; false otherwise

      • isNotNull

        protected boolean isNotNull​(java.lang.Object val)
        Checks whether an Object value is not null.
        Parameters:
        val - the object to check
        Returns:
        true if the value is not null; false otherwise
